category_sources: Official Tukaani/GitHub README describes XZ Utils as a compression library plus command-line tools.
source_facts.description: General-purpose data compression with high compression ratio.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is XZ Utils.
source_facts.name is xz, the package/tool name for XZ Utils.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents overview, command-line tools, liblzma, versioning, bugs, and contact information.
source_facts.homepage is the official Tukaani XZ page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes .xz, legacy .lzma, LZMA2 filters, liblzma, and command-line tools.
